contentList.content: Ring of Creation

A legendary ring imbued with the power to summon items from across the realms. Grants the ability to summon the Level 13 Plus Gear Chest, Boots of the Stormwalker, Moonguard Plate, Armor of Tyr, Moonguard Splint, Armor of the Dragonrider, Circlet of Willpower, and Armor of Testing.
Summon Level 13 Gear Chest
Summon the Level 13 Plus Gear Chest at the target location. The chest contains powerful equipment for level 13+ characters.
Summon Boots of Stormwalker
Summon the Boots of the Stormwalker at the target location. These magical boots grant enhanced mobility and lightning resistance.
Test Ring (Simple)
A simple test ring with no special properties. Used to verify the mod delivery system is working correctly.
Summon Moonguard Plate
Summon the Moonguard Plate at the target location. This legendary plate armor is blessed by Selûne and provides exceptional protection.
Summon Armor of Tyr
Summon the Armor of Tyr at the target location. This legendary half plate is blessed by Tyr, the God of Justice.
Summon Moonguard Splint
Summon the Moonguard Splint at the target location. This legendary splint armor is blessed by Selûne, the Moonmaiden.
Summon Armor of Dragonrider
Summon the Armor of the Dragonrider at the target location. This legendary Githyanki half plate combines psionic barriers with divine haste magic.
Summon Circlet of Willpower
Summon the Circlet of Willpower at the target location. This legendary circlet strengthens mental fortitude and grants powerful immunities.
Armor of Testing
A test copy of the Armor of Tyr, created to investigate chest delivery issues. This half plate armor grants +2 to saving throws, Celestial Haste, Misty Step, and Spirit Guardians.
Summon Armor of Testing
Summon the Armor of Testing at the target location. This test armor is a copy of the Armor of Tyr for chest delivery investigation.
